title: keyfile.rs load_identity uses eprintln\! bypassing tracing subscriber
description: keyfile.rs:20 uses eprintln\! for the --no-passphrase warning instead of tracing::warn\!. This bypasses the tracing subscriber's filtering, rate-limiting, and structured output. In TUI mode the eprintln\! output goes to stderr (correct per DESIGN.md §14), but it bypasses log level filtering, cannot be redirected to log files, and produces unstructured output inconsistent with the rest of the codebase. Should use tracing::warn\! for consistency and observability.
